item.title: Novenas you can start today - 08 March
item.description:
Blessed Conrad Of Bavaria
Blessed Gertrude Of Trzebnica
Blessed Josep Mestre Escoda
Blessed Juan Nepomuceno Zegri Y Moreno
Blessed Maria Barbara Maix
Many Martyrs Of Alexandria
Saint Agricola Of Chalon Sur Saone
Saint Alexander 17 March
Saint Ambrose Of Alexandria
Saint Diemut Of Saint Gall
Saint Gabriel Lalemant
Saint Gertrude Of Nivelles
Saint Jan Sarkander
Saint Llinio Of Llandinam
Saint Patrick
Saint Paul Of Cyprus
Saint Stephen Of Palestrina
Saint Theodore Of Rome
Saint Thomasello
Saint Withburgh

Feast Day: 17 March
Start Date: 08 March
End Date: 16 March
